tech_news.title: Microsoft fixes storage-hogging Windows 11 folder - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft has addressed an issue causing a permissions-related folder to hog a massive amount of storage space on Windows 11 PCs. The update is included in its optional June 2026 update.

tech_news.description: One of the minds behind the original Doom games and id Software has commented on the layoffs executed by Xbox and the importance of the studio's history.
